Class OrderDAO

java.lang.Object
com.project.dao.OrderDAO
public class OrderDAO extends Object
Data Access Object for order management.

This class handles database operations related to orders and order items, including retrieving, creating, and managing order records.

  • Method Details

    • getAllOrders

      public List<Order> getAllOrders()

    • getOrderItemsByOrderId

      public List<OrderItem> getOrderItemsByOrderId(int orderId)

    • placeOrder

      public int placeOrder(double totalAmount, String paymentMethod, List<OrderItem> items)
      Place a complete order in ONE transaction: 1. INSERT into orders → order_id 2. INSERT each order_item → item_id (with size, sugar, ice) 3. INSERT each topping row → order_item_toppings 4. COMMIT (or ROLLBACK on any failure)
      Parameters:
      totalAmount - total price for the order
      paymentMethod - e.g. "CASH", "CARD"
      items - list of OrderItem objects (with toppings attached)
      Returns:
      the new order_id, or -1 on failure

    • createOrder

      public int createOrder(double totalAmount, String paymentMethod)
      Deprecated.
      Use placeOrder(double, String, List) for transactional inserts.

    • addOrderItem

      public void addOrderItem(int orderId, int menuItemId, String itemName, int quantity, double unitPrice, double subtotal)
      Deprecated.
      Use placeOrder(double, String, List) for transactional inserts.
